title: uralepis livida
intro: Uralepis livida, also known as the yellow passion flower, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Uralepis livida can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
